hero.title: Eva Montes
hero.lead: A delicate, intense and elegant artistic proposal with a contemporary identity.

biography.title: Artistic journey
biography.description: The artistic path combines training, stage presence and recognition in different areas of young music.
items: Academy member of the Julià Carbonell Orchestra
Violin - Professional Orchestra of the Liceu
Violin - En Clave de Arts Orchestra

items.title: Winner of Mil Descobreix 2025 in Xàtiva, Valencia
items.description: Outstanding recognition in the field of young talent.

items.title: “Maestro Alonso” Piano Award, July 2024 in El Escorial, Madrid
items.description: Winner of the first prize of the Asociación Legado Maestro Alonso for the performance of “Pilarcita”.

items.title: Awarded at Joves Creadors Liceu for three consecutive years: 2024, 2025 and 2026
items.description: Participation and recognition in the young creators programme linked to the Liceu.

items.title: Third prize for the vocal performance in the “Joves Interprets Musicals” competition in Andorra
items.description: Recognition obtained in the young music performers competition in Andorra.

items.title: Honourable mention at Sant Anastasi 2026 in singing
items.description: Honorary recognition in the singing category.

items.title: First place at the Academica International Studies Song Competition 2026
items.description: International award for the vocal performance.
